title: Acinodendron psychrophilum

The exact classification of Acinodendron psychrophilum is Acinodendron psychrophilum (DC.) Kuntze, a classification that combines the original name of the plant with a revised genus classification. The species is further classified within the family Melastomataceae and the order Myrtales. The plant's classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships and place within the plant kingdom.
